mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, is_private, confirm, create_date FROM scj_info_comment WHERE is_private = #{isPrivate} ORDER BY create_date ASC
SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, is_private, confirm, create_date FROM scj_info_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scj_info_comment WHERE is_private = #{isPrivate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scj_info_comment (user_id, user_name, content, is_private, confirm, create_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{isPrivate}, #{confirm}, NOW())
